title: Comfortable Ethiopian Haddock Stir-Fry
description: A herbal and comforting dish featuring halal-friendly haddock, cooked with aromatic herbs for a dense, flavorful meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Season the haddock with salt and pepper, then place it skin-side down in the skillet. Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Drain the diced tomatoes and add them to the skillet along with their juices.
Stir in the ground cumin, chopped parsley, and chopped cilantro.
Cover the skillet and simmer for about 5 minutes.
Garnish with additional fresh herbs if desired.
Serve hot as a comforting dinner dish.
